type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The wood residue fired boilers were not used in 2012. Only the natural gas boilers were used in 2012 which resulted in decreased emissions.  Since there were no emissions from the wood residue boilers, the 2012 emissions were based on published emission factors only, compared to the use of this method and site specific emission factors in previous years.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The source testing for particulate matter at Windset Delta during 2011 was significantly lower when compared to the test results from the previous year.  Windset Delta also used more natural gas fuel and less wood residue fuel in 2011 which resulted in reduced particulate emissions for the year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: The emission of PM10 at Windset Delta was below the NPRI reporting threshold and is reported on a voluntary basis for the 2011 reporting year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The minor increase in PM2.5 emissions was due to the use wood residue fuel in Q4 of 2018 due to the natural gas supply curtailments from the northern BC pipeline rupture.  The PM2.5 reduction from decreased natural gas use was not enough to offset the PM2.5 increase from starting up the wood residue boiler.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The minor increase in NOx emissions was due to increased wood residue fuel use and decreased natural gas use, along with overall energy needs for a greenhouse facility that change with varying weather conditions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The minor increase in CO emissions was due to increased wood residue fuel use and decreased natural gas use, along with overall energy needs for a greenhouse facility that change with varying weather conditions.  CO emissions were not reported for the previous 6 years as they were below the reporting threshold for these years.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The minor increase in PM2.5 emissions was due to increased wood residue fuel use and decreased natural gas use, along with overall energy needs for a greenhouse facility that change with varying weather conditions

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: The Carbon Monoxide emissions from the Windset Farms (Canada) Ltd. facility are reported voluntarily for 2020.   The annual 2020 CO emissions were marginally below the NPRI Reporting Threshold and will be monitored and/or reported if they exceed this Threshold in future years.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: PM2.5 estimates are based both on test data for TPM and published emission factors for PM10 and PM2.5 as a percentage of TPM.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There was a malfunction in the ESP due to a failed transformer in one of the ESP fields which led to higher than normal stack test results measured in March.  The transformer was subsequently replaced and a retest in November resulted in releases that were in line with historic levels.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: Increase in wood residue combustion resulted in higher PM10 emissions. There was also a malfunction in the ESP due to a failed transformer in one of the ESP fields which led to higher than normal stack test results taken in March.  The transformer was subsequently replaced and a retest in November resulted in releases that were in line with historic levels.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There was a malfunction in the ESP due to a failed transformer in one of the ESP fields which led to higher than normal stack test results taken in March.  The transformer was subsequently replaced and a retest in November resulted in releases that were in line with historic levels.

reasonsForNoActivities.en: Insufficient understanding of how to implement pollution prevention activities
